global_goal: Finalize a reproducible En->DE single-audio cascade workflow with persistent kernel reuse and evaluation artifacts under outputs/cascade_v1.
Keep prompt-only quality and latency tuning explicitly gated behind a clean Objectif 1 baseline and a clean repo state.
Track which runtime branch is active, frozen, or superseded so Ralph iterations stay bounded and auditable.

reopen_policy.note: Frozen, falsified, and superseded branches must not become active again unless the plan names an allowed reopen condition explicitly.

hypotheses.title: Bootstrap the first bounded mission slice
hypotheses.question: What is the first concrete and verifiable slice that should be executed for this mission?

scope.slice: Replace the placeholders with the first real bounded slice for the mission.

hypotheses.success_signal: The bootstrap placeholders are replaced with one real bounded mission slice and the loop can execute or refine it immediately.
hypotheses.failure_signal: The mission stays in placeholder mode and the loop drifts into broad exploration without a concrete next step.

evidence.summary: Initial blank mission scaffold. Replace this with the actual first bounded mission slice before the first real run.

hypotheses.title: Lock a reproducible single-audio cascade and evaluation loop
hypotheses.question: Can the repo provide one stable workflow that reuses the persistent .venv-inference kernel to run ccpXHNfaoy.wav through the full-vLLM En->DE cascade and write outputs plus OmniSTEval metrics to outputs/cascade_v1/?

scope.slice: Define and execute the minimal reproducible baseline that writes inference outputs and evaluation metrics for ccpXHNfaoy.wav under outputs/cascade_v1/ without unnecessary model reloads.

hypotheses.success_signal: outputs/cascade_v1/ contains the baseline inference artifacts plus BLEU, CHRF, XCOMETXL, LongYAAL CU, and LongYAAL CA produced through the split inference/evaluation environments without unnecessary kernel reloads.
hypotheses.failure_signal: The baseline still depends on ad hoc manual steps, does not persist the required artifacts, or forces kernel/model reloads that break the fast-iteration contract.

evidence.summary: The mission now explicitly requires a reproducible En->DE single-audio baseline with inference artifacts, OmniSTEval metrics, persistent kernel reuse, and a local commit.
Before the current iteration, the cascade loaded the full-vLLM stack and printed streaming output but did not yet establish the required outputs/cascade_v1/ artifact contract.
The repo now has a versioned outputs/cascade_v1 artifact contract shared by inference and evaluation, including manifest, hypothesis, stream updates, and evaluation outputs.
A repo-local OmniSTEval entrypoint now filters the corpus segmentation down to the hypothesis sources so the single-audio baseline can be evaluated without inventing a new dataset layout.
A synthetic single-audio hypothesis bundle wrote BLEU, CHRF, LongYAAL CU, LongYAAL CA, and an explicit XCOMETXL placeholder without loading the inference models.
The evaluation environment now pins setuptools<81 so COMET and torchmetrics can still import pkg_resources reproducibly under Python 3.13.
The evaluation entrypoint now computes BLEU/chrF/latency independently of XCOMET and persists structured metric_blockers, including offline local-cache misses.

The first real ccpXHNfaoy.wav bundle now exists with offline evaluation artifacts: BLEU=0.0013, CHRF=6.5501, LongYAAL CU=144127.5131, LongYAAL CA=-988.2935, and XCOMETXL blocked because the model is not cached locally.
The persisted final German translation contains only a short 62-word prefix while the ASR transcript is complete, exposing the next Objective 1 runtime bug to fix.
The cascade now translates punctuation-stable utterances incrementally with per-segment Gemma token budgets, avoiding the previous full-transcript truncation under Gemma's 1024-token context limit.
The refreshed baseline now persists a materially complete 709-word final German translation for ccpXHNfaoy.wav instead of the earlier 62-word prefix.

The corrected baseline reevaluation now reports BLEU=40.3126, CHRF=68.5453, LongYAAL CU=2638.8114, LongYAAL CA=-12600.8309, while XCOMETXL remains explicitly blocked offline because Unbabel/XCOMET-XL is not cached locally.

hypotheses.title: Tune prompt-only cascade variants under LongYAAL CU below 2 seconds
hypotheses.question: After Objectif 1 is clean and the repo is clean, can prompt-only and lightweight context variants improve BLEU, CHRF, and XCOMETXL while keeping LongYAAL CU below 2 seconds on ccpXHNfaoy.wav?

scope.slice: Explore only prompt changes, previous-sentence reinjection, and conservative tail trimming after a clean baseline exists; commit every experiment separately.

hypotheses.success_signal: At least one committed experiment improves BLEU, CHRF, or XCOMETXL over the clean baseline while keeping LongYAAL CU below 2 seconds on the target audio.
hypotheses.failure_signal: Iterations start before the clean baseline exists, the repo is not clean, or the branch drifts into custom models, training, or non-prompt-only changes.

evidence.summary: The follow-up objective explicitly allows only prompting, previous-context reinjection, and conservative trimming variants, with a commit for each experiment and a LongYAAL CU target below 2 seconds.

A corrected Objective 1 baseline now exists with BLEU=40.3126, CHRF=68.5453, LongYAAL CU=2638.8114, and an explicit offline XCOMETXL blocker, so prompt-only latency tuning is now the next bounded branch.

Objective 2 now has a shared raw-vs-emitted translation layer plus a repo-local replay entrypoint, so conservative emission policies can be screened on the locked stream bundle without another vLLM reload.

A freeze_major_tail_rewrites replay with a 14-word window lowered LongYAAL CU to 1940.9677 while keeping BLEU=40.3126, CHRF=68.5453, and the offline XCOMETXL blocker unchanged, but it did not improve quality and left the branch annexed.

hypotheses.title: Keep the freeze14 emission replay as an annex rather than the promoted path
hypotheses.question: Should the non-final freeze_major_tail_rewrites replay with a 14-word window become the promoted Objective 2 runtime path?

scope.slice: Replay a deterministic emission policy over the captured raw translation stream without reloading models, and only promote it if the broader latency profile stays sane.

hypotheses.success_signal: The replayed emission policy improves the usable latency profile, not just LongYAAL CU, while preserving final quality on the real bundle.
hypotheses.failure_signal: The replay only improves a narrow latency slice or behaves like a metric hack, so it should stay annexed instead of becoming the default runtime path.

evidence.summary: The repo now separates raw translation computation from emitted stream policy and can replay emission alternatives against the locked raw bundle without another vLLM run.

The freeze14 replay preserves BLEU=40.3126, CHRF=68.5453, and XCOMETXL=NA while lowering LongYAAL CU to 1940.9677, but it leaves LongAL/LongLAAL/LongDAL on the CU side pathological, so the branch remains frozen_annex.

iteration_ledger.bounded_outcome: Initialized a blank Ralph mission scaffold with one active bootstrap hypothesis.
Replaced the blank mission bootstrap with a concrete Objective 1 baseline branch and a frozen Objective 2 prompt-only tuning branch.
Landed a versioned outputs/cascade_v1 artifact contract, notebook-safe baseline entrypoints, and a repo-local OmniSTEval driver for the single-audio path without reloading the model stack.

Produced the first real outputs/cascade_v1 bundle and offline evaluation for ccpXHNfaoy.wav, hardened evaluation against XCOMET failures, and exposed that the persisted final translation is still only a short prefix.

Replaced full-transcript Gemma truncation with utterance-incremental translation, reran the real baseline to a full final translation plus refreshed offline metrics, and reopened Objective 2 because the corrected runtime artifact now exists.

Separated raw versus emitted translation timelines, restored the canonical baseline bundle, and parked a freeze14 emission replay in an annex after it lowered LongYAAL CU below 2 seconds without improving quality.
